name: 理发店渲染回退
author: :P
description: 将新版理发店渲染回退到旧版：隐藏手臂、去除转化预览、恢复旧式着装

twee._comment1: 理发店渲染回退旧版 去除TF预览/隐藏手臂/简化着装 v5.10-0.7 2026-07-05 :P
twee.from:
<<selectmodel "main">>
				<<hidelayer "base">>
				<<set _modeloptions.arm_left to "none">>
				<<set _modeloptions.arm_right to "none">>
				<<set _modeloptions.tanningEnabled to false>>
				<<set _modeloptions.skin_type = Skin.color.natural>>
				<<set _modeloptions.skin_tone = Skin.color.tan>>
				<<set _modeloptions.scars to false>>
				<<set _modeloptions.freckles = $player.freckles == true and $makeup.concealer != 1>>
				<<set _modeloptions.mouth to 'neutral'>>
				<<set _modeloptions.facevariant = $facevariant>>
				<<set _modeloptions.left_eye = $makeup.eyelenses.left != 0 ? $makeup.eyelenses.left : $leftEyeColour>>
				<<set _modeloptions.right_eye = $makeup.eyelenses.right != 0 ? $makeup.eyelenses.right : $rightEyeColour>>
				<<showlayer "brows">>
				<<set _modeloptions.brows to "top">>
				<<set _modeloptions.brows_colour to ($makeup.browscolour != 0 ? $makeup.browscolour : $naturalhaircolour)>>
				<<if $browsDyeOption isnot "noChange" and $browsDyeOption isnot "removeDye">>
					<<set _modeloptions.brows_colour to $browsDyeOption>>
				<</if>>

				<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour = $haircolour>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour = $hairfringecolour>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_gradient = $hairFringeColourGradient>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_style = $hairFringeColourStyle>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_gradient = $hairColourGradient>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_style = $hairColourStyle>>
				<<if $twoToneHairDye>>
					<<if !setup.colours.hair_map[$twoToneDyeOption1] or !setup.colours.hair_map[$twoToneDyeOption2]>>
						<<set $twoToneDyeOption1 = $haircolour>>
						<<set $twoToneDyeOption2 = $hairfringecolour>>
					<</if>>
					<<set _gradient = {
						style: $twoToneStyle,
						colours: [$twoToneDyeOption1, $twoToneDyeOption2]
					}>>
					<<if $dyedHairPart isnot "fringe">>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour = $twoToneDyeOption1>>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_gradient = clone(_gradient)>>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_style to "gradient">>
					<</if>>
					<<if $dyedHairPart isnot "sides">>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour = $twoToneDyeOption2>>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_gradient = clone(_gradient)>>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_style to "gradient">>
					<</if>>
				<<else>>
					<<set _newColour = $dyeOption == "removeDye" ? $naturalhaircolour : $dyeOption>>
					<<if _newColour isnot "noChange">>
						<<if $dyedHairPart isnot "fringe">>
							<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour = _newColour>>
							<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_style to "simple">>
						<</if>>
						<<if $dyedHairPart isnot "sides">>
							<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour = _newColour>>
							<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_style to "simple">>
						<</if>>
					<</if>>
				<</if>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_sides_length to $hairOption != $hairlength ? convertHairLengthToStage("sides", $hairOption) : $hairlengthstage>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_length to $fringeOption != $fringelength ? convertHairLengthToStage("fringe", $fringeOption) : $fringelengthstage>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_type to $fringetype>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_sides_type to $hairtype>>

				/* Automate this later so it doesn't need to be manually updated with every new TF part that gets added */
				<<set _modeloptions.angel_wings_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.bird.wings) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.angel.wings) and $chimera.angelharpy.wings is true ? "harpy-default" :
					$transformationParts.angel.wings>>
				<<set _modeloptions.bird_malar_type to $transformationParts.bird.malar>>
				<<set _modeloptions.bird_tail_type to $transformationParts.bird.tail>>
				<<set _modeloptions.bird_wings_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.angel.wings) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.bird.wings) and $chimera.angelharpy.wings is true ? "default-angel" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.fallenAngel.wings) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.bird.wings) and $chimera.fallenharpy.wings is true ? "default-fallen" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.wings) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.bird.wings) and $chimera.demonharpy.wings is true ? "default-demon" :
					$transformationParts.bird.wings>>
				<<set _modeloptions.cat_ears_type to $transformationParts.cat.ears>>
				<<set _modeloptions.cat_tail_type to $transformationParts.cat.tail>>
				<<set _modeloptions.cow_ears_type to $transformationParts.cow.ears>>
				<<set _modeloptions.cow_horns_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.horns) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.cow.horns) and $transformationParts.demon.horns is "succubus" and $chimera.demoncow.horns is true ? "succubus-demon" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.horns) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.cow.horns) and $chimera.demoncow.horns is true ? "default-demon" :
					$transformationParts.cow.horns>>
				<<set _modeloptions.cow_tail_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.cow.tail) and $transformationParts.cow.tail is "black" and $chimera.demoncow.tail is true ? "black-demon" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.cow.tail) and $chimera.demoncow.tail is true ? "default-demon" :
					$transformationParts.cow.tail>>
				<<set _modeloptions.demon_wings_type to $transformationParts.demon.wings>>
				<<set _modeloptions.demon_tail_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.cat.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and $chimera.demoncat.tail is true ? "default-cat" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.cow.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and $chimera.demoncow.tail is true ? "default-cow" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.fox.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and $chimera.demonfox.tail is true ? "hidden" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.wolf.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and $chimera.demonwolf.tail is true and $transformationParts.wolf.tail is "feral" ? "default-feral" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.wolf.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and $chimera.demonwolf.tail is true ? "default-wolf" :
					$transformationParts.demon.tail>>
				<<set _modeloptions.demon_horns_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.cow.horns) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.horns) and $transformationParts.demon.horns is "succubus" and $chimera.demoncow.horns is true ? "succubus" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.cow.horns) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.horns) and $chimera.demoncow.horns is true ? "default" :
					$transformationParts.demon.horns>>
				<<set _modeloptions.fallen_wings_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.bird.wings) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.fallenAngel.wings) and $chimera.fallenharpy.wings is true ? "harpy-default" :
					$transformationParts.fallenAngel.wings>>
				<<set _modeloptions.fox_cheeks_type to $transformationParts.fox.cheeks>>
				<<set _modeloptions.fox_ears_type to
					$demon gte 6 and $fox gte 6 and $chimera.demonfox.ears is true ? "default-demon" :
					$transformationParts.fox.ears>>
				<<set _modeloptions.fox_tail_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.fox.tail) and $chimera.demonfox.tail is true ? "default-demon" :
					$transformationParts.fox.tail>>
				<<set _modeloptions.wolf_ears_type to $transformationParts.wolf.ears>>
				<<set _modeloptions.wolf_tail_type to
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.wolf.tail) and $transformationParts.wolf.tail is "feral" and $chimera.demonwolf.tail is true ? "demon-feral" :
					!["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.demon.tail) and !["hidden", "disabled"].includes($transformationParts.wolf.tail) and $chimera.demonwolf.tail is true ? "demon-default" :
					$transformationParts.wolf.tail>>
				<<set _modeloptions.show_tf = $transformationShow>>

				<<set _modeloptions.worn.over_upper.index to 3>>
twee.to:
<<selectmodel "main">>
				<<set _modeloptions.tanningEnabled to false>>
				<<set _modeloptions.skin_type = Skin.color.natural>>
				<<set _modeloptions.skin_tone = Skin.color.tan>>
				<<set _modeloptions.freckles = $player.freckles == true and $makeup.concealer != 1>>
				<<set _modeloptions.mouth to 'neutral'>>
				<<set _modeloptions.facevariant = $facevariant>>
				<<set _modeloptions.left_eye = $makeup.eyelenses.left != 0 ? $makeup.eyelenses.left : $leftEyeColour>>
				<<set _modeloptions.right_eye = $makeup.eyelenses.right != 0 ? $makeup.eyelenses.right : $rightEyeColour>>
				<<showlayer "brows">>
				<<set _modeloptions.brows to "top">>
				<<set _modeloptions.brows_colour to ($makeup.browscolour != 0 ? $makeup.browscolour : $naturalhaircolour)>>
				<<if $browsDyeOption isnot "noChange" and $browsDyeOption isnot "removeDye">>
					<<set _modeloptions.brows_colour to $browsDyeOption>>
				<</if>>

				<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour = $haircolour>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour = $hairfringecolour>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_gradient = $hairFringeColourGradient>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_style = $hairFringeColourStyle>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_gradient = $hairColourGradient>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_style = $hairColourStyle>>
				<<if $twoToneHairDye>>
					<<if !setup.colours.hair_map[$twoToneDyeOption1] or !setup.colours.hair_map[$twoToneDyeOption2]>>
						<<set $twoToneDyeOption1 = $haircolour>>
						<<set $twoToneDyeOption2 = $hairfringecolour>>
					<</if>>
					<<set _gradient = {
						style: $twoToneStyle,
						colours: [$twoToneDyeOption1, $twoToneDyeOption2]
					}>>
					<<if $dyedHairPart isnot "fringe">>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour = $twoToneDyeOption1>>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_gradient = clone(_gradient)>>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_style to "gradient">>
					<</if>>
					<<if $dyedHairPart isnot "sides">>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour = $twoToneDyeOption2>>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_gradient = clone(_gradient)>>
						<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_style to "gradient">>
					<</if>>
				<<else>>
					<<set _newColour = $dyeOption == "removeDye" ? $naturalhaircolour : $dyeOption>>
					<<if _newColour isnot "noChange">>
						<<if $dyedHairPart isnot "fringe">>
							<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour = _newColour>>
							<<set _modeloptions.hair_colour_style to "simple">>
						<</if>>
						<<if $dyedHairPart isnot "sides">>
							<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour = _newColour>>
							<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_colour_style to "simple">>
						<</if>>
					<</if>>
				<</if>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_sides_length to $hairOption != $hairlength ? convertHairLengthToStage("sides", $hairOption) : $hairlengthstage>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_length to $fringeOption != $fringelength ? convertHairLengthToStage("fringe", $fringeOption) : $fringelengthstage>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_fringe_type to $fringetype>>
				<<set _modeloptions.hair_sides_type to $hairtype>>

				<<set _modeloptions.worn.upper.index to 14>>
				<<set _modeloptions.worn.upper.colour to "white">>
				<<set _modeloptions.worn.lower.index to 15>>
				<<set _modeloptions.worn.lower.colour to "white">>
